zh.lifeSummary: 當Aleyne FitzAlan於1323年出生在英國英格蘭素可阿盧德爾時，她的父親Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel38歲，母親Alice de Warenne36歲。她於大約1350年與Sir Roger le Strange 5th Lord Strange of Knockin結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1385年1月20日在英國史洛普爾奧斯維斯崔享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aleyne FitzAlan于1323年出生在英国英格兰素可阿盧德爾时，她的父亲Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel38岁，母亲Alice de Warenne36岁。她于大约1350年与Sir Roger le Strange 5th Lord Strange of Knockin结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1385年1月20日在英国史洛普爾奧斯維斯崔享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾史福斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: FitzAlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Alan ( see Allen ), ‘son of Alan’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Allen
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Aleyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camille, Chantal, Julien, Marcell.

English: variant of   Allen  . This is an old-fashioned spelling, already established as a surname in England in Tudor times. Today this surname is found mainly in the West Indies, especially Barbados.

variants.name: Allen
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alan  , in Britain generally found only as a surname, but in North America equally common as a given name.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Aleyne FitzAlan was born in 1323, in Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, was 38 and her mother, Alice de Warenne, was 36. She married Sir Roger le Strange 5th Lord Strange of Knockin about 1350. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 20 January 1385, in Oswestry, Shropshire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aleyne FitzAlan est née en 1323, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Alice de Warenne, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Roger le Strange 5th Lord Strange of Knockin environ 1350. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 20 janvier 1385, à Oswestry, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aleyne FitzAlan 1323 in Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel 38 und ihre Mutter Alice de Warenne 36. Sie hat um 1350 Sir Roger le Strange 5th Lord Strange of Knockin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 20. Januar 1385 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Oswestry, Shropshire, England und wurde in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aleyne FitzAlan è nata il nel 1323 nel Arundel, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Alice de Warenne, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Sir Roger le Strange 5th Lord Strange of Knockin circa 1350. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 20 gennaio 1385, nel Oswestry, Shropshire, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Aleyne FitzAlanが1323年にイギリスイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundelは38歳，母Alice de Warenneは36歳であった。約1350年にSir Roger le Strange 5th Lord Strange of Knockinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1385年1月20日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアオスウエストリーで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Aleyne FitzAlan(이)가 1323년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Warenne(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1350년 Sir Roger le Strange 5th Lord Strange of Knockin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1385년 1월 20일 영국 슈럽실르 오스베스트리에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aleyne FitzAlan nasceu em 1323, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Warenne, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Roger le Strange 5th Lord Strange of Knockin aproximadamente 1350. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 20 de janeiro de 1385, em Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aleyne FitzAlan родилась в 1323 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Warenne, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Roger le Strange 5th Lord Strange of Knockin около 1350 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 20 января 1385 г. в местности освестри, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir Roger le Strange 5th Lord Strange of Knockin aproximadamente 1350. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 20 de enero de 1385, en Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
